title: Traffic Lights
description: What each light, arrow, and pedestrian signal tells you to do.

scenarios.prompt: The light is solid red. Tap what you should do.

choices.label: Go if no one is around

feedback.correct: Yes — a red light means come to a full stop and wait for green.
feedback.slow: Red means a full stop, not just slowing down. Try again.
feedback.go: Even if it's empty, red means stop and wait. Try again.
feedback.default: Red means stop and wait. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: The light turns solid yellow. Tap what you should do.

choices.label: Slow down and stop if you safely can
Speed up to beat the red

feedback.correct: Yes — yellow means the light is about to turn red. Slow down and stop if you can do it safely.
feedback.fast: Don't speed up on yellow — it means red is coming. Slow down and stop if safe. Try again.
feedback.ignore: Yellow is a warning that red is next. Slow down and stop if you can. Try again.
feedback.default: Yellow means slow down and stop if it's safe. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: The light is green. Tap what you should do.

choices.label: Go, if the way is clear

feedback.correct: Yes — green means go, but first make sure the way is clear.
feedback.stop: Green means go (when it's clear), not stop. Try again.
feedback.blind: Go on green, but always check that the way is clear first. Try again.
feedback.default: Green means go when the way is clear. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: The light is flashing red. Tap what you should do.

choices.label: Treat it like a stop sign

feedback.correct: Yes — a flashing red light means the same as a stop sign: stop, then go when it's clear.
feedback.go: A flashing red light means stop first, like a stop sign. Try again.
feedback.slow: Flashing red means a full stop, like a stop sign. Try again.
feedback.default: Flashing red means stop, like a stop sign. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: The light is flashing yellow. Tap what you should do.

choices.label: Slow down and go with care

feedback.correct: Yes — flashing yellow means slow down and go carefully. You don't have to stop.
feedback.stop: You don't have to stop at flashing yellow — just slow down and go carefully. Try again.
feedback.fast: Slow down at flashing yellow, don't speed up. Try again.
feedback.default: Flashing yellow means slow down and go with care. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: You see a green left arrow. Tap what it means.

choices.label: You may turn left now — it's protected

feedback.correct: Yes — a green arrow means you can turn that way now, and oncoming traffic is stopped for you.
feedback.straight: A green left arrow means you may turn left now. Try again.
feedback.stop: A green arrow means go ahead and turn that way. Try again.
feedback.default: A green arrow means you may turn that way now. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: You see a red left arrow. Tap what it means.

choices.label: Turn left if no cars are coming

feedback.correct: Yes — a red arrow means you can't turn that way yet. Wait until it changes.
feedback.turn: A red arrow means wait, even if it looks clear. Try again.
feedback.go: A red arrow means stop and wait for that turn. Try again.
feedback.default: A red arrow means wait — don't turn yet. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: Tap the light that means STOP.

feedback.correct: Yes — the top red light means stop.
feedback.green: Green means go. The red light (on top) means stop. Try again.
feedback.yellow: Yellow means slow down. The red light means stop. Try again.
feedback.default: Red, the top light, means stop. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: You see this signal at a crosswalk. Tap what it means.

feedback.correct: Yes — the white walking person means it's okay to start crossing.
feedback.stop: The walking person means people may cross. The orange hand means stop. Try again.
feedback.default: The walking person means you may cross. Try again.

scenarios.prompt: You see this signal at a crosswalk. Tap what it means.

feedback.correct: Yes — the orange hand means don't start crossing. Wait for the walking person.
feedback.walk: The orange hand means don't start crossing yet. Try again.
feedback.default: The raised hand means don't start crossing. Try again.
